instruction_txt_key: In this task, you have some trials where you can earn money for yourself and some trials where you can earn money for a charity
instruction_txt_touch: In this task, you have some trials where you can earn money for yourself and some trials where you can earn money for a charity

instruction_txt_key:
You will be paid a prorated amount for what you earn on the task.
The charity you select will also be paid a prorated amount for what you earn on the task.
instruction_txt_touch:
You will be paid a prorated amount for what you earn on the task.

instruction_txt_key:
When you see a COLORED CIRCLE, you can WIN money!
When you see a COLORED BOX, you may LOSE money!
instruction_txt_touch:
When you see a COLORED CIRCLE, you can WIN money!
When you see a COLORED BOX, you may LOSE money!

instruction_txt_key: You have to press the 'n' key with your index finger when you see the WHITE SQUARE to WIN or NOT LOSE.
instruction_txt_touch: You can tap anywhere on the screen when you see the WHITE SQUARE to WIN or NOT LOSE.

instruction_txt_key: The WHITE SQUARE flashes on the screen very quickly, so be ready to respond!
instruction_txt_touch: The WHITE SQUARE flashes on the screen very quickly, so be ready to respond!

config_title_text: Select the charity you would like to earn money for:
choice1_txt: works to educate, support, advocate, listen and lead to improve the lives of people with mental illness and their loved ones
choice2_txt: national peer-led organization offering vital support, resources, and wellness tools for people with depression, bipolar disorder, and their families
choice3_txt: non-profit network of academic medical centers dedicated to improving the lives of those affected by depression and related mood disorders
